name: Chocolate Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup halved maraschino cherries, patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 2 1/2 cups vanilla chocolate chips and the semisweet chocolate chips in the top half of a double boiler. Melt together over simmering water.
2. Stir until smooth. Add marshmallows, Rice Krispies, and walnuts; mix well.
3. Spread evenly on a 13-inch pizza pan coated with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Arrange cherries on top; sprinkle with coconut.
5. Melt remaining vanilla chocolate chips with oil in the microwave or over low heat until smooth.
6. Drizzle over the pizza.
7. Chill until firm. Serve at room temperature.
Yield: 16-10 slices
